Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO GOVERNMENTAL OPERATIONS

Title: Requires the state to participate in the United Nations for certain purposes
Summary: Requires the state to participate in the United Nations human rights council's universal periodic review by submitting a report in the capacity of a subnational stakeholder.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law, in relation to requiring the department of state to participate in the United Nations for certain purposes where the federal government has disengaged
